title: The Bunger Project
description:
Introducing the cutest minecraft mob ever seen!
The Bunger!
body:
**Have you ever thought Minecraft needs some more Cuteness in the game?!**

*Well have I got a surprise for you!*

Presenting Bunger!

![Two bungers standing on Dripleaf in Minecraft](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/PltjIimx/images/0ad45660cbde7d0414aaccf448ef13d81cf3b436.png)

This fuzzy little fellow will do everything he can to be your best friend!
Spawning In Lush Caves, with his fluffy body and his amazing voicelines he will make sure you have a good time!

- **Finally glow berries have a purpose!**

Breed him with glow berries to get a tiny bunger!

- **Easy transportation?**

Yes! Bunger can easily be scooped into a bucket to be taken on Journeys across the world!

So what are you waiting for! try out the bunger mod right now!

N1ghtScout Creator Of Bunger

Model by: TugkanDeMan

Mod Coded by: Ivan-Khar
